parameter_slots.goal: <intended improvement, e.g. 'unify dispatch behind adapter interface'>

prompt_template: Propose a plan to refactor {component} to {goal}. Output: (a) target shape, (b) which files change at what line ranges, (c) migration steps in order, (d) tests that need updating. PLAN ONLY — do not modify any files.
notes: Tests planning rigor. Pin should target a refactor that's already been planned/executed so baseline can be compared against the actual outcome.
